episode.title: MTG Fast Finance EP 341: 40K Previews Kickoff
episode.description: James and Derek break down all the latest in fast moving card prices, the latest MTGO/Paper Modern and Pioneer results, Cards to Watch and go over the best of the latest Warhammer 40K x Magic card previews.
